appDescription.message: List and copy all tab URLs locally. Zero tracking, no servers, minimal permissions.
appDescription.description: Extension description shown in the Chrome Web Store

loading.description: Shown while tabs are being fetched

tabCount.description: Number of tabs displayed in the header

includeTitles.description: Checkbox label for including page titles

allWindows.description: Checkbox label for including all Chrome windows

formatLabel.description: Label for the output format selector

outputAriaLabel.description: Accessible label for the output textarea

refresh.description: Button label to refresh the tab list

refreshAriaLabel.description: Accessible label for the refresh button

copy.description: Button label to copy the list to clipboard

copyAriaLabel.description: Accessible label for the copy button

tabsError.description: Status message when tabs cannot be fetched

noTabs.description: Shown when zero tabs are returned
